atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Patient reports anxiety regarding abnormal lab work and referral to you.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports being anxious about abnormal lab work.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He states he doesn't really understand what the immunoglobulin A level means.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: but that she told him it was low.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He has experienced frequent colds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: and always says his colds linger for a long time.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: but he's unsure if it's more than usual this winter.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He denies any abdominal infections.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: or frequent diarrhea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His family is generally healthy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He owns a donut shop.

atomic_propositions.speaker: PCP
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient was started on metformin by his PCP for type two diabetes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He has tried to donate blood but was denied due to recent international travel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he has had a history of an immunoglobulin deficiency.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been diagnosed with type two diabetes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports frequent respiratory tract infections and/or sinus infections.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an immunoglobulin deficiency.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's low immunoglobulin A level is consistent with an immunoglobulin deficiency.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will order additional blood work to evaluate for other antibody deficiencies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will follow up with the patient in four weeks if symptoms persist or if there are any changes to his abdominal tract.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will also recommend that he inform any healthcare providers of his history of an immunoglobulin deficiency when receiving blood products.
